changes.description: Added OBJECT_TYPES, ACTOR_ROLES, TASK_STATES, PLAN_EPIC_STATES, CLOSE_REASONS constants. Added state and owner_actor fields to Issue dataclass with valid_states() method.
Bumped SCHEMA_VERSION to 3. Added state/owner_actor columns, plan type, state CHECK constraint, indexes. Added _migrate_to_v3() with backfill logic.
Updated create() to accept owner_actor. Updated claim() to set state='in_progress'. Updated close() to set state='closed'.
Updated JSONL export/import to include state and owner_actor fields.
